hero.title: About
hero.description: We are a small team passionate about building fast, content-driven websites.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: To make web development simpler and more accessible by replacing complex CMS setups with clean, version-controlled JSON content that any team can manage.

values.title: Speed
values.description: We build for performance from day one — no bloat, no unnecessary dependencies.

values.title: Simplicity
values.description: Content in JSON files means anyone on the team can update the site without touching code.

values.title: Quality
values.description: Every component, every page, every line of content is crafted with care.
